items.br: Extrai as opções de matching entre PO, recebimento e fatura (2-way, 3-way, 4-way match). Define o nível de controle na validação de pagamentos e prevenção de erros ou fraudes.
items.en: Extracts PO, receipt, and invoice matching options (2-way, 3-way, 4-way match). Defines the level of control for payment validation and fraud or error prevention.
items.es: Extrae las opciones de matching entre PO, recepción y factura (2-way, 3-way, 4-way match). Define el nivel de control en la validación de pagos y prevención de errores o fraudes.
